sources.title: The Possession Of David O' Reilly
sources.description: When David comes to their Victorian apartment in search of help, Alex and Kate welcome in their old friend. However they soon learn that David is convinced demonic monsters are trying to break in.

metadata.Plot: When David comes to their Victorian apartment in search of help, Alex and Kate welcome in their old friend. However they soon learn that David is convinced demonic monsters are trying to break in.
metadata.Actors: Giles Alderson, Francesca Fowler, Paul McGuinness
